label: UAT: v22-project-changelog
prompt: Run the acceptance test for milestone 'v22-project-changelog'. IMPORTANT: You are running INSIDE the sdlc server process at http://localhost:7777. Write signed checklist results to `.sdlc/milestones/v22-project-changelog/uat_results.md`. Then call `sdlc milestone complete v22-project-changelog` if all steps pass.
